Seattle / Washington

A club for
every kind of day.

East | West is designed to become part of your routine. Work when you need to focus. Golf when you need a break. Share a meal, bring the family, or simply stay a while.

Built around the ordinary Tuesday.

Become a Founding Member

Welcome to the
East | West Club.

East | West began with a simple belief. The most fulfilling lives make room for two kinds of energies: the drive to move forward and the ability to return to what matters.

That's what we wanted this place to make possible. A club for work, play, health, and connection. Where ambition and belonging exist side by side.

A place that helps you move through the world with purpose without losing yourself in the process. Somewhere you never need an occasion to come in, only a reason to stay.

The Club Started
As a Conversation.

From early golf rounds to building businesses and raising families in Seattle, Shankar & Ryan have spent more than twenty years sharing ideas, conversations, and the kind of friendship that shaped this club.

After years of hearing Shankar describe the old clubs he grew up around in India, they realized Seattle was missing a place like it. Not another country club, but somewhere easy to drop into, where work, family, golf, and good conversation naturally come together.

Get to Know the Founders

Take a Look
Inside.

Golf simulators. A neighborhood café. Lounges. Wellness. Chef partnerships. A rooftop enclave. Member dinners, tastings, tournaments, and gatherings.

Seattle / Washington

The Road to
Opening.

Now

Founding memberships open. Secure your place and help shape the club from the very beginning.

Summer 2026

Pop-ups start. Get your first look at East | West through exclusive previews and founder programming.

Through 2026

The community comes to life. Member dinners, tastings, golf nights, workshops, and curated gatherings as the Cedar Building opens.

Q1 2027

The full club opens. All amenities, programming, and member spaces come together under one roof.
